name: Acolyte
description: You have spent your life in the service of a temple to a specific god or pantheon of gods.

name: Criminal
description: You are an experienced criminal with a history of breaking the law.

name: Folk Hero
description: You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for so much more.

name: Noble
description: You understand wealth, power, and privilege.

name: Sage
description: You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse.

name: Soldier
description: War has been your life for as long as you care to remember.

name: Charlatan
description: You have always had a way with people, able to tease out their desires after a few minutes of conversation.

name: Entertainer
description: You thrive in front of an audience, knowing how to entrance them, entertain them, and even inspire them.

name: Guild Artisan
description: You are a member of an artisan's guild, skilled in a particular field and closely associated with other artisans.

name: Hermit
description: You lived in seclusion, either in a sheltered community such as a monastery, or entirely alone.

name: Outlander
description: You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization and the comforts of town and technology.

name: Sailor
description: You sailed on a seagoing vessel for years.

name: Urchin
description: You grew up on the streets alone, orphaned, and poor.
